title: Pink Crystal Pvp Texture Pack
description: The Perfect Pink Crystal Pvp Texture Pack.
body: _**The Perfect Pink Texture Pack Made For Minecraft Version 1.21 - 1.21. This Texture Pack Is Greatly Recommended By Many Minecraft Players, This Texture Pack Includes, Pink Crystals, Pink Obsidian, Small Totem Pop, No Explosion Particles, Totem With 2 Different Colored Eyes, Transparent Shield And Alot More Waiting For You Ahead.**_
